codeReview.summary: Feature pipeline-command correctly implements VAL-PIPELINE-001. The pipeline command was added to nim_router.py with all required CLI options (--input, --url, --chunk-size, --overlap, --format). The implementation includes chunk_text() for token-based text chunking, format_chunks_json/markdown/text() for output formatting, and run_pipeline() for orchestrating the RAG pipeline. Tests in tests/test_pipeline.py cover the basic functionality.

summary: Feature pipeline-command passes review. The basic pipeline command with CLI interface was implemented correctly at commit 73b75e7. The feature fulfills VAL-PIPELINE-001 (pipeline command exists with --help showing usage). Subsequent commits (f27a7a5 semantic chunking, 5a57c41 batch processing) extend the pipeline capability beyond this feature's scope.
